purpose: Expected per-field output for the demo + a self-check for Cursor. status ∈ prefilled | comment_judgment | unable_to_assess. 'source' points to the exact Synthea row that justifies the value/comment.

patient_sin.note: synthetic US SSN; on a real CRA form this is a SIN

patient_postal.reason: Synthea record is US-format (ZIP 00000); no Canadian postal code in record

walking_markedly_restricted.comment: Strong supporting evidence: chronic paralysis due to a spinal-cord lesion with a vertebral fracture and spinal-cord injury (onset 2025-09-10), an active spinal-cord-injury rehabilitation care plan, and an ongoing course of physiotherapy (Sep–Nov 2025). This consistently supports a marked restriction in walking — but you must certify the clinical judgment.

sources.match: Chronic paralysis due to lesion of spinal cord (disorder)
Fracture of vertebral column with spinal cord injury (disorder)

walking_nature.comment: Traumatic spinal-cord injury (2025-09-10) with resulting chronic paralysis.

sources.match: Traumatic injury of spinal cord and/or vertebral column (disorder)

walking_effects.comment: Ongoing rehabilitation and physiotherapy indicate a sustained mobility limitation affecting everyday life; quantify the specific functional impact for the form.

walking_onset_year.comment: Marked restriction dates from the spinal-cord injury on 2025-09-10.

sources.match: Chronic paralysis due to lesion of spinal cord (disorder)

walking_duration_12mo.comment: TEACHING CASE: the injury onset is 2025-09-10, so as of 2026-06-20 only ~9 months have ELAPSED — under 12. However CRA accepts an impairment that is EXPECTED to last a continuous period of ≥12 months. Chronic paralysis from a spinal-cord lesion is expected to be prolonged. This is a judgment call, not a lookup — the dates alone would say 'No'; the clinical prognosis says 'Yes'.

sources.match: Chronic paralysis due to lesion of spinal cord (disorder)

eliminating_markedly_restricted.comment: Spinal-cord injury commonly affects bowel/bladder function, but this record contains no explicit documentation of an elimination impairment. Assess directly before certifying.

sources.match: Traumatic injury of spinal cord and/or vertebral column (disorder)

dressing_markedly_restricted.comment: Paralysis can restrict dressing, but no dressing-specific functional assessment is documented in this record. Confirm before certifying.

sources.match: Chronic paralysis due to lesion of spinal cord (disorder)
